virtualInstrument.title: Virtual instrument
virtualInstrument.description: MIDI messages will be sent to the logs
virtualInstrument.enabled: Virtual instrument enabled - MIDI messages will be sent to logs

debugButton.title: Debug Button
debugButton.description: Shows the button to open the debug console

calibrationButton.title: Calibration Microphone Button
calibrationButton.description: Shows the microphone button to calibrate audio delays for instruments

lightingButton.title: Lighting Control Button
lightingButton.description: Shows the light bulb button to manage LED strips and lighting rules

serialMidi.title: Serial MIDI (GPIO)
serialMidi.description: Use Raspberry Pi UART GPIO pins as MIDI IN/OUT ports (requires hardware circuit)
serialMidi.clickScan: Click "Scan" to detect available serial ports
serialMidi.noPorts: No serial ports detected. Check /boot/config.txt UART overlays
serialMidi.notAvailable: serialport package not installed. Run: npm install serialport

update.title: System Update
update.description: Download and install the latest version
update.warning: Fetches latest changes, updates dependencies and restarts the server
update.confirmMessage:
The system will download the latest version, update dependencies and restart the server.

The application will be temporarily unavailable during the update.
update.success: Update complete! The server is restarting...
update.restartTimeout: Server is not responding. Please reload the page manually.

bluetooth.title: Bluetooth Instruments Search
bluetooth.operationMayTakeTime: This operation may take a few seconds
bluetooth.tip: Make sure your Bluetooth instrument is in pairing mode and within range (10-15m max) before starting the search.

disabled.title: Bluetooth disabled
disabled.message: The Bluetooth adapter is currently disabled.
disabled.enableMessage: Please enable it to scan for available devices.

forgetDevice.title: Forget this device?
forgetDevice.message: Do you really want to forget {deviceName}?
forgetDevice.warning: This will remove the pairing with this device.

network.title: Network Instruments Search
network.searchingDevices: Searching for devices on the network...
network.operationMayTakeTime: This operation may take a few seconds
network.tip: Make sure your instrument is connected to the same WiFi network as this device and is turned on before starting the search.

invalidIP.format:
Invalid IP address
Expected format: xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx
Example: 192.168.1.100

disconnect.title: Disconnect device
disconnect.message: Are you sure you want to disconnect this device?
disconnect.warning: The device will be disconnected and will no longer receive MIDI messages.

midiEditor.title: MIDI Editor
midiEditor.multipleChannelsTip: Disable channels you don't want to modify
midiEditor.singleChannelRequired: Please keep only one channel active to modify its instrument
midiEditor.multipleChannelsWarning: Multiple channels active ({count}). Please disable the channels you don't want to modify by clicking on their buttons.
midiEditor.noCCOnChannel: No CC on this channel — use tools to create some
midiEditor.noFileLoaded: No file loaded. Please open a MIDI file first.
midiEditor.libraryNotLoaded: The webaudio-pianoroll library is not loaded. Check that the script is included in index.html.
midiEditor.backendNotSupported:
The backend doesn't support MIDI file reading yet.

The "file_read" command must be added to the backend.
Meanwhile, use the classic editor.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedChanges.message: You have made changes that have not been saved.
unsavedChanges.warning: If you close now, these changes will be LOST.

midiEditor.connectedDeviceTip: Select an output device to see which notes it can play (grayed out = unplayable)
midiEditor.saveAsDescription: Save a copy with a new name
midiEditor.drawDensityTip: Minimum spacing between points in draw mode

ui.dropToRoot: 📂 Drop here to move to root
ui.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to continue?
ui.virtualInstrumentType: Virtual instrument • Messages sent to logs
ui.virtualInstrumentEnabled: Virtual instrument ENABLED - MIDI messages will be displayed here
ui.noMidiOutput:
No MIDI output device available.

Please connect a MIDI device, enable the virtual instrument in settings, or create a virtual port.
ui.reloadingDevices: Reloading devices to include virtual instrument...
ui.virtualInstrumentLoadError:
Error: virtual instrument could not be loaded.

Please refresh the page.
ui.channelToVirtualIgnored: Channel {channel} → 🎹 Virtual Instrument (ignored in backend mode)
ui.mixedModeInfo: Mixed mode: some channels routed to virtual instrument
ui.noMidiFilesDropped: No MIDI files found in the dropped files.

instrumentSettings.title: Instrument Settings
instrumentSettings.serialNumberHelp: Unique identifier to differentiate identical devices
instrumentSettings.syncDelayHelp: Positive = delay, negative = advance (for multi-instrument sync)
instrumentSettings.macAddressHelp: To associate settings with Bluetooth devices
instrumentSettings.sysexHelp: Make sure the device supports SysEx Identity Request messages.
instrumentSettings.capabilitiesHelp: Define the capabilities of this instrument to optimize MIDI routing.
instrumentSettings.noteRangeHelp: E.g.: 88-key piano = 21 (A0) to 108 (C8). Leave empty for all notes.
instrumentSettings.clickToSelect: Click on keys to define the range
instrumentSettings.gmInstrumentHelp: Select the instrument type for MIDI routing
instrumentSettings.drumKitNotice: Drum kits use MIDI channel 10 and discrete note mode. These settings will be applied automatically on save.
instrumentSettings.polyphonyHelp: Maximum number of simultaneous notes (1-128). Default: 16
instrumentSettings.midiChannelHelp: MIDI channel used by this instrument (already-used channels are disabled)
instrumentSettings.commTimeoutHelp: Maximum wait time for a response (in ms)
instrumentSettings.supportedCCsHelp: Comma-separated CC numbers. E.g.: 1=Modulation, 7=Volume, 64=Sustain. Leave empty for all CCs.

lighting.title: Lighting Control
lighting.addDeviceHint: Click Add to create a device
lighting.selectDeviceHint: Select a device to view its rules
lighting.confirmDeleteDevice: Delete this device and all its rules?
lighting.addRuleHint: Add a rule to react to MIDI events
lighting.confirmLoadPreset: Load this preset? Current rules will be replaced.

instrumentManagement.title: Instrument Management
instrumentManagement.subtitle: Configure, organize, and manage all your MIDI instruments
instrumentManagement.adjustFilter: Try adjusting your search or filter
instrumentManagement.scanToStart: Scan for devices to get started
instrumentManagement.settingsNotAvailable: Instrument settings not available. Please ensure the module is loaded.
instrumentManagement.deleteConfirm:
Are you sure you want to remove this instrument from the database?

Note: The physical device will not be affected.
instrumentManagement.deleteChannelConfirm: Delete this instrument? Other instruments on this device will not be affected.
instrumentManagement.allChannelsUsed: All MIDI channels are already in use on this device.
instrumentManagement.selectChannelHelp: Select a free channel (used channels are greyed out)
instrumentManagement.virtualNamePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the type name

channelRouter.title: MIDI Routing Configuration
channelRouter.routingRequiredMessage:
MIDI routing is not configured for "{filename}".

Do you want to configure it now?

fileOperations.deleteFolderConfirm: Do you really want to delete the folder "{folder}"?
fileOperations.deleteFileConfirm: Do you really want to delete this file?

autoAssign.title: Auto-Assign Channels
autoAssign.analyzing: Analyzing MIDI file and matching instruments...
autoAssign.instructions: Select the instrument for each channel. The best match is pre-selected.
autoAssign.previewAdaptedTip: Preview the adapted version with transposition
autoAssign.quickAssignTip: Automatically assign all channels with best match
autoAssign.quickAssignConfirm: Quick assign will automatically select the best instrument for each channel. Continue?
autoAssign.noActiveChannels: No active channels in this MIDI file
autoAssign.duplicateInstrumentTip: This instrument is also assigned to channel(s) {channels}
autoAssign.componentNotLoaded: Auto-assign module failed to load. Please refresh the page.
autoAssign.noteOffsetHint: Shift all drum notes (useful for mapping to a different kit)
autoAssign.previewChannelTip: Preview this channel with current settings
autoAssign.strategyTransposeDesc: Shift all notes to fit instrument range
autoAssign.strategyOctaveWrapDesc: Fold out-of-range notes into nearest octave
autoAssign.strategyIgnoreDesc: Play as-is (out-of-range notes may be clipped)
autoAssign.splitAvailableBanner: {count} channel(s) can be split across multiple instruments for better coverage
autoAssign.unsavedChangesMessage: You have modified instrument assignments, strategies, or transpositions that haven't been applied yet. Closing will discard these changes.
autoAssign.allChannelsSkipped: All channels were auto-skipped — no compatible instruments available. Please add or configure instruments in settings.

matrix.title: Matrix
matrix.selectChannel: Select a channel to see its details
matrix.selectInstrument: Select an instrument to see its details
matrix.clickToAssign: Click a cell in the matrix to assign a channel to an instrument
matrix.settingsNotAvailable: Instrument settings not available from this context

instrumentCapabilities.title: Complete Instrument Capabilities
instrumentCapabilities.subtitle: Some instruments are missing information needed for optimal auto-assignment. Please complete the required fields.
instrumentCapabilities.recommendedHint: These fields improve auto-assignment quality but are not required.
instrumentCapabilities.noteArrayPlaceholder: Enter MIDI note numbers separated by commas (e.g., 36, 38, 42, 46, 48)
instrumentCapabilities.fullSettingsHint: Access advanced configuration, latency settings, and more
instrumentCapabilities.fullSettingsComingSoon: Full instrument settings page coming soon!

drumKitsDesc.0: Versatile all-purpose kit, ideal for pop/rock/variety
drumKitsDesc.8: Ambient room reverb sound, more natural feel
drumKitsDesc.32: Soft and mellow sounds, light cymbals, jazz/bossa
drumKitsDesc.48: Timpani, orchestral bass drum, cymbals, classical/film
drumKitsDesc.56: Sound effects and noises, not a real drum kit

tablature.noStringInstrument: No string instrument configured for this channel
tablature.singleChannelRequired: Select a single channel to use tablature

drumPattern.title: Drum Pattern
drumPattern.singleChannelRequired: Select a single channel to use drum pattern
drumPattern.humanize: Randomize velocity and timing for natural feel

stringInstrument.title: String Instrument Configuration
stringInstrument.name: Instrument Name
stringInstrument.configCreated: String instrument configuration created with default preset.
stringInstrument.configExists: A string instrument configuration already exists for this device.

calibration.title: Delay Calibration (Microphone)
calibration.thresholdHint: Increase if mic picks up ambient noise, decrease if no sound detected
calibration.measurementsHint: More measurements = more precise but longer
